sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 5g of fat. cholesterol, saturated fat, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.
sections.subtitleText: 5g of fat. cholesterol, saturated fat, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 3.9g of carbs. sugar and glycemic index matter most here. for dairy, that is exactly the kind of thing you want.
sections.subtitleText: 3.9g of carbs. sugar and glycemic index matter most here. for dairy, that is exactly the kind of thing you want.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 9g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.
sections.subtitleText: 9g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 22% daily value stands out most. that is only mild support overall.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 22% daily value stands out most. that is only mild support overall.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: calcium at 11% daily value stands out most. useful, but still pretty limited.
sections.subtitleText: calcium at 11% daily value stands out most. useful, but still pretty limited.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: fermented-food angle adds extra value because that gives it a practical benefit beyond the visible protein and fat numbers alone. quite filling for the calories because the protein density gives it strong practical satiety value. easy high-protein staple because very easy to build meals or snacks around.

displayItems.explanation: That gives it a practical benefit beyond the visible protein and fat numbers alone.

displayItems.title: quite filling for the calories
displayItems.explanation: The protein density gives it strong practical satiety value.

displayItems.title: easy high-protein staple
displayItems.explanation: Very easy to build meals or snacks around.

sections.subtitleText: on the plus side: fermented-food angle adds extra value because that gives it a practical benefit beyond the visible protein and fat numbers alone. quite filling for the calories because the protein density gives it strong practical satiety value. easy high-protein staple because very easy to build meals or snacks around.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: saturated fat is not trivial because still much cleaner than weak dairy foods, but not ultra-low-fat. not suitable for everyone because lactose tolerance and dairy tolerance vary. healthiness can shift with toppings because sugary add-ins can change the practical outcome fast.

displayItems.title: saturated fat is not trivial
displayItems.explanation: Still much cleaner than weak dairy foods, but not ultra-low-fat.

displayItems.title: not suitable for everyone
displayItems.explanation: Lactose tolerance and dairy tolerance vary.

displayItems.title: healthiness can shift with toppings
displayItems.explanation: Sugary add-ins can change the practical outcome fast.

sections.subtitleText: now the downsides: saturated fat is not trivial because still much cleaner than weak dairy foods, but not ultra-low-fat. not suitable for everyone because lactose tolerance and dairy tolerance vary. healthiness can shift with toppings because sugary add-ins can change the practical outcome fast.

closing.summary: Greek Yogurt has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in S tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in S tier with an overall score of 67 from a base nutrition score of 63. Context lifted it by 4 points.
